Brevard County Home Loans

FHA loans in Brevard County, Florida

Brevard County is Florida's Space Coast — home to Kennedy Space Center, a thriving aerospace and defense industry, and miles of Atlantic coastline. Cities like Palm Bay and Melbourne offer affordable homes and a growing base of well-paying tech jobs, a combination that makes Brevard a strong FHA market. The loan limit comfortably covers the typical home, so 3.5% down works for first-time buyers and relocating professionals alike.

Brevard County FHA limit (1-unit)$541,287

2026 single-family

Minimum down3.5%

With a 580+ score

Min credit score580

500–579 with 10% down

Property types1–4 units

Owner-occupied

What the FHA limit means in Brevard County

With the 2026 FHA floor of $541,287 and FHA's 3.5% minimum down, you can finance a Brevard County home priced up to roughly $560,000 (your loan covers the price minus your down payment). Across most of Brevard, that covers the large majority of homes, including plenty of new construction. A handful of Florida counties are set higher, so we confirm Brevard County's exact figure with HUD.

The Space Coast's affordable, job-rich market

Brevard pairs affordable housing with stable aerospace, defense, and tech employment — the kind of steady income FHA underwriters favor. Palm Bay offers some of the best value and new construction, while Melbourne anchors the job market; both work well for first-time buyers. Pair FHA with Florida assistance and gift funds to keep your upfront cash low.

Cities We Serve

FHA loans in Brevard County cities

We help FHA buyers throughout Brevard County, including Palm Bay, Melbourne. Explore our local guides for a closer look at the market, loan limits, and down payment help in each:

Palm BayMelbourne

Down payment help in Brevard County

You don't have to cover the down payment alone. FHA allows gift funds, sellers can contribute up to 6% toward closing costs, and Brevard County buyers can often pair FHA with assistance from the Florida Housing Finance Corporation and Brevard County's local SHIP-funded programs. Funding and eligibility change frequently, so we'll help you confirm what's currently available — see our FHA down payment assistance guide.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Brevard County for 2026?+
Brevard County is at the 2026 Florida FHA floor of $541,287, which covers most homes in the county. Confirm the exact figure with HUD's official lookup.
Is the Space Coast good for FHA buyers?+
Yes — affordable homes plus stable aerospace and tech jobs make Brevard a strong fit for FHA buyers, especially in Palm Bay and Melbourne.
How much home can I buy with FHA in Brevard County?+
With the $541,287 limit and 3.5% down, you can finance a home up to roughly $560,000 — above the typical Brevard price.
How much down payment do I need in Brevard County?+
As little as 3.5% with a 580+ score, reduced with gift funds and Florida assistance.
Do you serve all of Brevard County?+
Yes — Palm Bay, Melbourne, Titusville, Cocoa, Rockledge, and every community in the county.
